arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Batch job queue.

compute_environment_order.description: A list specifying the order of compute environments in which jobs are submitted.

id.description: The unique identifier of the AWS Batch job queue.

job_state_time_limit_action.description: A list of actions to take when a job exceeds its state time limit.

priority.description: The priority of the AWS Batch job queue, determining the order of job execution.

scheduling_policy_arn.description: The ARN of the scheduling policy associated with the job queue.

state.description: The current state of the AWS Batch job queue (e.g., ENABLED or DISABLED).

status.description: The current status of the AWS Batch job queue, providing more detail than the state.

status_reason.description: The reason for the current status of the AWS Batch job queue, if applicable.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the AWS Batch job queue, useful for categorization and management.
